fix.item: Ensured the Joomla update site is created, enabled and linked to the installed site module during install/update.
Bumped the public update stream to 0.2.7 so Joomla can detect an available update from 0.2.6.
Relaxed the Joomla 6 target platform pattern for better Joomla 6.x matching.

note.item: This changelog intentionally lists only the latest release.
